title: command_ack
description: Sent by the plugin to acknowledge receipt of a server command

timing_total_ms.description: Total plugin-side processing time in ms (optional)

timing_queue_ms.description: Time waiting in Unity main-thread queue in ms (optional)

diagnostics.description: Execution diagnostics summary — call counts and option counts (optional)

current_env.description: Bot's actual current environment from Photon room properties (optional)

current_track.description: Bot's actual current track from Photon room properties (optional)

current_race.description: Bot's actual current race from Photon room properties (optional)
